sentences.translation: Salma je pročitala tužnu priču i zaplakala.
sentences.translationEn: Salma read a sad story and cried.

sentences.arabic: الْبُكَاءُ لَيْسَ ضَعْفًا بَلْ هُوَ تَعْبِيرٌ طَبِيعِيٌّ.
sentences.translation: Plakanje nije slabost nego je prirodno izražavanje.
sentences.translationEn: Crying is not weakness but a natural expression.

sentences.translation: Nakon plakanja Salma se osjetila olakšano.
sentences.translationEn: After crying Salma felt a sense of relief.

sentences.translation: Suze nam pomažu da izrazimo bol.
